## Documentation and release trail

Mark N/A when the item does not apply to this PR. Keep small docs-only PRs lightweight; the checklist is a reminder, not a forced gate.

- [ ] README or `docs/README.md` entry points were reviewed when reader navigation changed
- [ ] English and Japanese docs were kept in sync, or the intentional mismatch is called out
- [ ] Public API docs were reviewed when `config/public_api_manifest.yml`, public helpers, options, events, hooks, or JavaScript package-root exports changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated when the change is release-facing or notable for adopters
- [ ] `docs/en/release.md` / `docs/ja/release.md` were reviewed when release notes, package verification, migration expectations, or tag-time evidence changed
- [ ] Mockup inventory was reviewed when `docs/mockups/**` changed: Files table, `review-gallery.html`, and browser smoke target definitions
- [ ] Package verification impact was reviewed when README, CHANGELOG, `docs/**`, gemspec/package metadata, public API manifest, or packaged runtime files changed
- [ ] N/A

## Checks

- [ ] Relevant local checks were run
- [ ] GitHub Actions / PR CI will be used as the confirmation source
- [ ] Combined status was empty, so the GitHub Actions workflow run was checked directly
- [ ] Browser-capable visual evidence is attached when a mockup or visual reference needs visual review
- [ ] N/A

## Notes for reviewers

- This template is a contributor checklist only. It does not decide CODEOWNERS, required reviewers, branch protection, required checks, or repository settings.
